title: Human-in-the-Loop Approval
constraints: The workflow must pause and wait for human approval before executing any high-risk action
Low-risk actions should proceed automatically without human intervention
The workflow must resume from the approval point after human input, not restart
The human must see the proposed action and its risk assessment before approving or rejecting
hints: In LangGraph, use an interrupt_before or interrupt_after pattern with a checkpointer to pause the graph at the approval node
Classify actions as high-risk (refund > $100, account deletion, data export) vs low-risk (status lookup, FAQ) before routing
Store the pending action in the workflow state so the human reviewer can see exactly what they are approving

starterCode.langgraph:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: All actions are auto-approved, including high-risk ones like large refunds
# TODO: Add a human-in-the-loop approval step that pauses for review on high-risk actions
def process_request(request: str) -> str:
    risk_check = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content="Classify this request as high-risk or low-risk. High-risk: refunds over $100, account deletion, data export. Low-risk: everything else. Reply with just 'high' or 'low'."),
        HumanMessage(content=request),
    ])
    risk_level = risk_check.content.strip().lower()

    # BUG: High-risk actions are auto-approved
    action = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content=f"Execute this {risk_level}-risk customer request. Describe the action taken."),
        HumanMessage(content=request),
    ])
    return f"[{risk_level.upper()} RISK - AUTO-APPROVED] {action.content}"

requests = [
    "Please refund $250 for order #5678",
    "What is the status of my order #1234?",
    "Delete my account and all associated data",
]
for req in requests:
    result = process_request(req)
    print(f"Request: {req}\nResult: {result}\n")
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: All actions are auto-approved, including high-risk ones like large refunds
# TODO: Add a human-in-the-loop approval step that pauses for review on high-risk actions
agent = Agent(
    name="Request Processor",
    instructions="""You process customer requests. For each request:
1. Classify it as high-risk or low-risk (high-risk: refunds over $100, account deletion, data export)
2. Execute the action immediately regardless of risk level
Describe the action taken.""",
)

requests = [
    "Please refund $250 for order #5678",
    "What is the status of my order #1234?",
    "Delete my account and all associated data",
]
for req in requests:
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, req)
    print(f"Request: {req}\nResult: {result.final_output}\n")
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

# BUG: All actions are auto-approved, including high-risk ones like large refunds
# TODO: Add a human-in-the-loop approval step that pauses for review on high-risk actions
agent = Agent(
    role="Request Processor",
    goal="Process customer requests. Classify as high-risk or low-risk and execute immediately regardless of risk level.",
    backstory="You process customer requests.",
)

requests = [
    "Please refund $250 for order #5678",
    "What is the status of my order #1234?",
    "Delete my account and all associated data",
]
for req in requests:
    task = Task(
        description=req,
        expected_output="Action taken for the request",
        agent=agent,
    )
    crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
    result = crew.kickoff()
    print(f"Request: {req}\nResult: {result}\n")

evaluationCriteria.label: Pauses on high-risk actions
evaluationCriteria.description: The workflow interrupts and waits for human approval before executing high-risk actions

evaluationCriteria.label: Auto-approves low-risk actions
evaluationCriteria.description: Low-risk actions proceed without requiring human intervention

evaluationCriteria.label: Resumes after approval
evaluationCriteria.description: After human approval or rejection, the workflow continues from the approval point without restarting

evaluationCriteria.label: Shows pending action to reviewer
evaluationCriteria.description: The human reviewer can see the proposed action and risk assessment before deciding
